title: Factors Affecting Option Prices: The price of a put option increases as the underlying...
summary: Identify key factors affecting option prices: volatility, time, underlying price, and interest rates.
prompt: The price of a put option increases as the underlying asset price decreases.

options.text: The value of a put option increases when the price of the underlying asset

solution: The value of a put option increases when the price of the underlying asset decreases, as it gives the holder the right to sell at a higher price. [[24]]
